title: Walnut Skillet with Slovakian Twist
description: A hearty Slovakian-inspired skillet dish featuring crispy walnuts and a flavorful, slow-cooked twist.
instructions: 2. In a large skillet, toast the chopped walnuts over medium heat for 2-3 minutes.
3. Add the torn skillet-bread to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
4. Add the slow-cooked sausage to the skillet and stir to combine with the bread and walnuts.
5. Add the chopped onions and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onions are translucent.
6. Season the mixture with salt and black pepper to taste.
7. Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the bread is crispy and golden brown.
8. Serve the Walnut Skillet hot, garnished with additional chopped walnuts if desired.
